violations.description: Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --The water heater for the establishment is currently not working.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Ceiling tiles in the kitchen are missing.--Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. The wall near the 3 compartment sink has unfinished drywall.
